feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: एएसआई के ऊपर बोलेरो चढ़ाने का प्रयास, पांव हुआ फ्रैक्चर, चालक ले भागा बोलेरो

link.title: एएसआई के ऊपर बोलेरो चढ़ाने का प्रयास, पांव हुआ फ्रैक्चर, चालक ले भागा बोलेरो

entry.content: जोधपुर. जलजोग चौराहे के पास यातायात पुलिस के इशारे के बावजूद भाग रही बोलेरो को एएसआई के रोकने के बावजूद चालक ने गुरुवार को ऊपर चढ़ाने का प्रयास किया। बोनट पर गिरे एएसआई को चालक ने कुछ दूर तेज ब्रेक लगाकर नीचे गिराया और बोलेरो ले भागा। पांव में फ्रैक्चर के चलते एएसआई को मथुरादास माथुर अस्पताल में भर्ती कराया गया।
entry.summary: जोधपुर. जलजोग चौराहे के पास यातायात पुलिस के इशारे के बावजूद भाग रही बोलेरो को एएसआई के रोकने के बावजूद चालक ने गुरुवार को ऊपर चढ़ाने का प्रयास किया। बोनट पर गिरे एएसआई को चालक ने कुछ दूर तेज ब्रेक लगाकर नीचे गिराया और बोलेरो ले भागा। पांव में फ्रैक्चर के चलते एएसआई को मथुरादास माथुर अस्पताल में भर्ती कराया गया।

entry.title: Yuvraj Singh applaud Stuart Broad on reaching the huge milestone in Test Cricket वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Yuvraj Singh applaud Stuart Broad on reaching the huge milestone in Test Cricket वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Yuvraj Singh has retired from international cricket, but he is very active on social media and doesn’t shy away from giving his opinion on topics related to the game. The former India all-rounder congratulated Broad on reaching the huge milestone in his own way.
भारत के पूर्व आलराउंडर युवराज सिंह ने बुधवार को स्टुअर्ट ब्रॉड की जमकर सराहना की जबकि 13 साल पहले उन्हें एक ओवर में छह छक्के जड़कर इंग्लैंड के इस तेज गेंदबाज के करियर को लगभग खत्म कर दिया था। ब्रॉड मंगलवार को टेस्ट क्रिकेट में 500 विकेट चटकाने वाले चौथे तेज गेंदबाज जबकि कुल सातवें गेंदबाज बने। 34 साल के ब्रॉड ने वेस्टइंडीज के खिलाफ मैनचेस्टर में तीसरे और अंतिम टेस्ट के पांचवें दिन क्रेग ब्रेथवेट को आउट करके यह उपलब्धि हासिल की।
#YuvrajSingh #StuartBroad #StuartBroad500
entry.summary: Yuvraj Singh has retired from international cricket, but he is very active on social media and doesn’t shy away from giving his opinion on topics related to the game. The former India all-rounder congratulated Broad on reaching the huge milestone in his own way. भारत के पूर्व आलराउंडर युवराज सिंह ने बुधवार को स्टुअर्ट ब्रॉड की जमकर सराहना की जबकि 13 साल पहले उन्हें एक ओवर में छह छक्के जड़कर इंग्लैंड के इस तेज गेंदबाज के करियर को लगभग खत्म कर दिया था। ब्रॉड मंगलवार को टेस्ट क्रिकेट में 500 विकेट चटकाने वाले चौथे तेज गेंदबाज जबकि कुल सातवें गेंदबाज बने। 34 साल के ब्रॉड ने वेस्टइंडीज के खिलाफ मैनचेस्टर में तीसरे और अंतिम टेस्ट के पांचवें दिन क्रेग ब्रेथवेट को आउट करके यह उपलब्धि हासिल की। #YuvrajSingh #StuartBroad #StuartBroad500

entry.title: Piqued Duterte taunts doctors to mount ‘revolution’ against him

link.title: Piqued Duterte taunts doctors to mount ‘revolution’ against him

entry.content:
Philippine President Rodrigo Duterte dared medical societies to stage a “revolution” against him as he slammed them for going public with their criticisms of his government’s response to the COVID-19 pandemic.
Read:
entry.summary: Philippine President Rodrigo Duterte dared medical societies to stage a “revolution” against him as he slammed them for going public with their criticisms of his government’s response to the COVID-19 pandemic. Read:

entry.title: Making H&R Block More Digital

link.title: Making H&R Block More Digital

entry.content: The president and CEO of H&R Block discusses his eclectic career path, openness to learning and how his company is adapting to digital-first.
entry.summary: The president and CEO of H&R Block discusses his eclectic career path, openness to learning and how his company is adapting to digital-first.

entry.title: The Kissing Booth 3 on Netflix - Exclusive Sneak Peek

link.title: The Kissing Booth 3 on Netflix - Exclusive Sneak Peek

entry.content:
Check out this exclusive sneak peek at the Netflix romantic comedy The Kissing Booth 3, based on the book series by Beth Reekles. It stars Joey King, Joel Courtney, Jacob Elordi, Maisie Richardson-Sellers, Taylor Perez and Molly Ringwald.
The Kissing Booth 3 Release Date: 2021 on Netflix
Are you excited for The Kissing Booth 3? Be the critic on Fan Reviews!
entry.summary: Check out this exclusive sneak peek at the Netflix romantic comedy The Kissing Booth 3, based on the book series by Beth Reekles. It stars Joey King, Joel Courtney, Jacob Elordi, Maisie Richardson-Sellers, Taylor Perez and Molly Ringwald. The Kissing Booth 3 Release Date: 2021 on Netflix Are you excited for The Kissing Booth 3? Be the critic on Fan Reviews!

entry.title: Spycies - bande-annonce

link.title: Spycies - bande-annonce

entry.content:
Incarné par un duo fantaisiste d’agents secrets, composé de l’exigeant mais rebelle Vladimir et d’Hector le geek vaurien, le sort du monde se tiendra entre leurs pattes : suite au vol de la radiésite, matériau classé top secret sur une plateforme offshore, le tandem devra sauver la planète d’une menace climatique au cours de son enquête, menée tambour battant !
Au cinéma le 26 août 2020.
entry.summary: Incarné par un duo fantaisiste d’agents secrets, composé de l’exigeant mais rebelle Vladimir et d’Hector le geek vaurien, le sort du monde se tiendra entre leurs pattes : suite au vol de la radiésite, matériau classé top secret sur une plateforme offshore, le tandem devra sauver la planète d’une menace climatique au cours de son enquête, menée tambour battant ! Au cinéma le 26 août 2020.

entry.title: Captain Fathom S1E12 :Pisastros Private War (Animation,Adventure,Family,TV Series)

link.title: Captain Fathom S1E12 :Pisastros Private War (Animation,Adventure,Family,TV Series)

entry.content:
Captain Fathom: Pisastros Private War
30min		 Animation, Adventure, Family TV Series (1965– )
Captain Fathom and the crew of the Argonaut are ordered to attend the signing of a peace treaty between two small peaceful island nations. When the chief of one of the islands accidentally sinks a boat belonging to the other archipelago, the peace treaty is off and war is on unless Fathom and his crew can avert disaster.
Creators: Thomas M. Dykers, Curt Siodmak
Star: Warren Tufts
entry.summary: Captain Fathom: Pisastros Private War 30min Animation, Adventure, Family TV Series (1965– ) Captain Fathom and the crew of the Argonaut are ordered to attend the signing of a peace treaty between two small peaceful island nations. When the chief of one of the islands accidentally sinks a boat belonging to the other archipelago, the peace treaty is off and war is on unless Fathom and his crew can avert disaster. Creators: Thomas M. Dykers, Curt Siodmak Star: Warren Tufts

entry.title: Sushant केस में Rhea के खिलाफ Bihar Police को मिले अहम सबूत; जल्द दे सकती है नोटिस FilmiBeat

link.title: Sushant केस में Rhea के खिलाफ Bihar Police को मिले अहम सबूत; जल्द दे सकती है नोटिस FilmiBeat

entry.content:
Bihar Police finds important evidence against Rhea Chakraborty on Sushant Singh Rajput’s case.Watch video to know more.
#SushantSinghRajput #RheaChakrabortyFIR #RheaSushantMoney #SushantFatherKKSingh #RheaChakraborty
entry.summary: Bihar Police finds important evidence against Rhea Chakraborty on Sushant Singh Rajput’s case.Watch video to know more. #SushantSinghRajput #RheaChakrabortyFIR #RheaSushantMoney #SushantFatherKKSingh #RheaChakraborty

entry.title: Tik Tok: Banned or bought? Microsoft in talks to buy Tik Tok US Oneindia News

link.title: Tik Tok: Banned or bought? Microsoft in talks to buy Tik Tok US Oneindia News

entry.content:
Microsoft is in advanced talks to acquire the popular Chinese video app Tik Tok. There were speculations about the same when a few days ago US President Donald Trump had spoken of banning the app, citing national security and data security concerns. Microsoft is now exploring a deal with ByteDance to operate the Tik Tok service in the US, Canada, Australia and New Zealand
#TikTok #Microsoft #ByteDance
entry.summary: Microsoft is in advanced talks to acquire the popular Chinese video app Tik Tok. There were speculations about the same when a few days ago US President Donald Trump had spoken of banning the app, citing national security and data security concerns. Microsoft is now exploring a deal with ByteDance to operate the Tik Tok service in the US, Canada, Australia and New Zealand #TikTok #Microsoft #ByteDance

entry.title: Superman III (1983) - Bande annonce

link.title: Superman III (1983) - Bande annonce

entry.content:
Film - Film fantastique réalisé par Richard Lester.
Avec Christopher Reeve (Superman / Clark Kent), Richard Pryor (Gus Gorman), Robert Vaughn (Ross Webster), Annette O’Toole (Lana Lang), Margot Kidder (Lois Lane), Jackie Cooper (Perry White), Marck McLure (Jimmy Olsen), Annie Ross (Vera Webster), Pamela Stephenson (Lorelei Ambrosia), Helen Horton (miss Henderson), Barry Dennen (le docteur McClean), Al Matthews (le chef des pompiers).
Sortie en 1983
Synopsis :
Clark Kent, alias Superman, part en reportage à Smallville, la cité de son enfance. Pendant ce temps, à Métropolis, Gus Gorman, un «chômeur professionnel», suit un stage d’informatique dans une grande société. Il parvient rapidement à obtenir de coquettes primes en manipulant habilement l’ordinateur. Webster, son patron, découvre ses talents de fraudeur, lui passe ses filouteries et décide de les mettre à profit pour dominer l’économie mondiale. Ses projets, aussi fous qu’irréalistes, sont loin d’être purement mercantiles. Pour commencer, il charge Gus de détruire les récoltes de café en Colombie. Celui-ci entreprend de pirater les satellites météo…
En savoir plus :
L’actualité du cinéma :
Les films de la semaine :
Retrouvez Télérama sur :
Facebook :
Instagram :
Twitter :
Youtube :
entry.summary: Film - Film fantastique réalisé par Richard Lester. Avec Christopher Reeve (Superman / Clark Kent), Richard Pryor (Gus Gorman), Robert Vaughn (Ross Webster), Annette O’Toole (Lana Lang), Margot Kidder (Lois Lane), Jackie Cooper (Perry White), Marck McLure (Jimmy Olsen), Annie Ross (Vera Webster), Pamela Stephenson (Lorelei Ambrosia), Helen Horton (miss Henderson), Barry Dennen (le docteur McClean), Al Matthews (le chef des pompiers). Sortie en 1983 Synopsis : Clark Kent, alias Superman, part en reportage à Smallville, la cité de son enfance. Pendant ce temps, à Métropolis, Gus Gorman, un «chômeur professionnel», suit un stage d’informatique dans une grande société. Il parvient rapidement à obtenir de coquettes primes en manipulant habilement l’ordinateur. Webster, son patron, découvre ses talents de fraudeur, lui passe ses filouteries et décide de les mettre à profit pour dominer l’économie mondiale. Ses projets, aussi fous qu’irréalistes, sont loin d’être purement mercantiles. Pour commencer, il charge Gus de détruire les récoltes de café en Colombie. Celui-ci entreprend de pirater les satellites météo… En savoir plus : L’actualité du cinéma : Les films de la semaine : Retrouvez Télérama sur : Facebook : Instagram : Twitter : Youtube :

entry.title: Arkadaşının tavsiyesiyle yediği balon balığı canından etti, uzmanlar uyardı

link.title: Arkadaşının tavsiyesiyle yediği balon balığı canından etti, uzmanlar uyardı

entry.content:
Mehmet Berk’in sağlıklıyken hastanedeki görüntüsü
-Sedat Berk röp.
-Mehmet Gökoğlu röp.
-detay
-balon balığı görüntüsü (arşiv)
( ANTALYA )- Kanseri yendi, balon balığına yenildi- "Akdeniz Üniversitesi Su Ürünleri Fakültesi Öğretim Üyesi Prof. Dr. Mehmet Gökoğlu:- "Yaz döneminde zehri yükseliyor, kesinlikle tüketilmesin"- Vefat eden kişinin oğlu Sedat Berk:- "Kimse bu balığının lezzetine kanıp yemesin, isteyene getirip vermesin, vebal almasın, babam, ‘bana bir şey olmaz zihniyetiyle vefat etti" ANTALYA
- Antalya’nın Kumluca ilçesindeki Adrasan Tatil Merkezinde arkadaşının tavsiyesi ile balon balığı tüketen 67 yaşındaki kişi 3 günlük yaşam savaşını kaybetti.Kanser tedavisinin ardından sağlığına kavuşan 67 yaşındaki Mehmet Berk, dinlenmek ve moral depolamak için Adrasan’a yakınlarının yanına yerleşti. Berk’in bir arkadaşı Cuma günü öğleden sonra balon balığı avladı. Arkadaşının ‘ Ben yiyorum bir şey olmaz’ demesi üzerine Mehmet Berk’te balıktan bir miktar yedi. 2 saat sonra fenalaşan Berk, ilk önce Kumluca Devlet Hastanesi’ne oradan da Antalya’ya özel bir hastaneye sevk edildi. Yapılan tüm müdahalelere rağmen Mehmet Berk, bugün gece yarısı kalp ve akciğerde solunum yetmezliğine bağlı yaşamını yitirdi."Arkadaşının tavsiyesiyle tüketti"Babasının Antalya’da yaşadığını belirten Sedat Berk, havasının temiz ve sakin olduğu gerekçesiyle yaz dönemini Adrasan’da geçirdiğini belirtti.
Babasının kanser hastalığını atlattığını dile getiren Berk, “Ama vücut direnci düşüktü. Kendini toparladı zannetti. Bir arkadaşı, ‘Ben yiyorum bir şey olmaz’ demesi üzerin balon balığı yiyor. 2 saat sonra rahatsızlanıyor. Kumluca Devlet Hastanesi’ne daha sonra özel hastanesine getiriliyor. Bugünde vefat etti.”dedi.
"Etli lezzetli diye yemeyin"Kendisinin de amatör balıkçı olduğunu dile getiren Berk, “Defalarca sosyal medya hesaplarımdan da uyarı yaptım. Babamla beraber de çok balığa gittik. Balon balığını hala tüketenler var. Lokum gibi et çıkıyor diye yeniliyor. Ama yanlış ette de zehir var. Kimse bu balığının lezzetine kanıp yemesin. İsteyene getirip vermesin, vebal almasın. Babam, ‘bana bir şey olmaz zihniyetiyle vefat etti. Yemeyin ve kimseye vermeyin.”ifadelerine yer verdi."Yaz döneminde zehri artıyor"Akdeniz Üniversitesi Su Ürünleri Fakültesi Öğretim Üyesi Prof. Dr. Mehmet Gökoğlu, Antalya Körfezi’nde 7 tür balon balığı olduğunu ve hepsinin zehirli olduğuna dikkat çekti.Yaz döneminde balon balığının zehirli toksinlerinin üst seviyeye çıktığının altını çizen Gökoğlu, “Balığının yenmemesi gerektiğini söylüyoruz. Bu balık yakalanabilir ama tüketilmesin. Bazı insanların bünyeleri alerjiktir. Yaz döneminde daha çok dikkat edilsin. Önce felç ediyor daha sonra ölüme götürüyor. Balon balığı yakalandığı zaman zaman hemen şişip balon şeklini alıyor. Bütün bir diş yapısı ve koparıcıdır. Bilinmeyen balık kesinlikle yenmemelidir” dedi.
entry.summary: Mehmet Berk’in sağlıklıyken hastanedeki görüntüsü -Sedat Berk röp. -Mehmet Gökoğlu röp. -detay -balon balığı görüntüsü (arşiv) ( ANTALYA )- Kanseri yendi, balon balığına yenildi- "Akdeniz Üniversitesi Su Ürünleri Fakültesi Öğretim Üyesi Prof. Dr. Mehmet Gökoğlu:- "Yaz döneminde zehri yükseliyor, kesinlikle tüketilmesin"- Vefat eden kişinin oğlu Sedat Berk:- "Kimse bu balığının lezzetine kanıp yemesin, isteyene getirip vermesin, vebal almasın, babam, ‘bana bir şey olmaz zihniyetiyle vefat etti" ANTALYA - Antalya’nın Kumluca ilçesindeki Adrasan Tatil Merkezinde arkadaşının tavsiyesi ile balon balığı tüketen 67 yaşındaki kişi 3 günlük yaşam savaşını kaybetti.Kanser tedavisinin ardından sağlığına kavuşan 67 yaşındaki Mehmet Berk, dinlenmek ve moral depolamak için Adrasan’a yakınlarının yanına yerleşti. Berk’in bir arkadaşı Cuma günü öğleden sonra balon balığı avladı. Arkadaşının ‘ Ben yiyorum bir şey olmaz’ demesi üzerine Mehmet Berk’te balıktan bir miktar yedi. 2 saat sonra fenalaşan Berk, ilk önce Kumluca Devlet Hastanesi’ne oradan da Antalya’ya özel bir hastaneye sevk edildi. Yapılan tüm müdahalelere rağmen Mehmet Berk, bugün gece yarısı kalp ve akciğerde solunum yetmezliğine bağlı yaşamını yitirdi."Arkadaşının tavsiyesiyle tüketti"Babasının Antalya’da yaşadığını belirten Sedat Berk, havasının temiz ve sakin olduğu gerekçesiyle yaz dönemini Adrasan’da geçirdiğini belirtti. Babasının kanser hastalığını atlattığını dile getiren Berk, “Ama vücut direnci düşüktü. Kendini toparladı zannetti. Bir arkadaşı, ‘Ben yiyorum bir şey olmaz’ demesi üzerin balon balığı yiyor. 2 saat sonra rahatsızlanıyor. Kumluca Devlet Hastanesi’ne daha sonra özel hastanesine getiriliyor. Bugünde vefat etti.”dedi. "Etli lezzetli diye yemeyin"Kendisinin de amatör balıkçı olduğunu dile getiren Berk, “Defalarca sosyal medya hesaplarımdan da uyarı yaptım. Babamla beraber de çok balığa gittik. Balon balığını hala tüketenler var. Lokum gibi et çıkıyor diye yeniliyor. Ama yanlış ette de zehir var. Kimse bu balığının lezzetine kanıp yemesin. İsteyene getirip vermesin, vebal almasın. Babam, ‘bana bir şey olmaz zihniyetiyle vefat etti. Yemeyin ve kimseye vermeyin.”ifadelerine yer verdi."Yaz döneminde zehri artıyor"Akdeniz Üniversitesi Su Ürünleri Fakültesi Öğretim Üyesi Prof. Dr. Mehmet Gökoğlu, Antalya Körfezi’nde 7 tür balon balığı olduğunu ve hepsinin zehirli olduğuna dikkat çekti.Yaz döneminde balon balığının zehirli toksinlerinin üst seviyeye çıktığının altını çizen Gökoğlu, “Balığının yenmemesi gerektiğini söylüyoruz. Bu balık yakalanabilir ama tüketilmesin. Bazı insanların bünyeleri alerjiktir. Yaz döneminde daha çok dikkat edilsin. Önce felç ediyor daha sonra ölüme götürüyor. Balon balığı yakalandığı zaman zaman hemen şişip balon şeklini alıyor. Bütün bir diş yapısı ve koparıcıdır. Bilinmeyen balık kesinlikle yenmemelidir” dedi.

entry.title: Man finds lizard in Sambhar at top Delhi restaurant, video goes viral Oneindia News

link.title: Man finds lizard in Sambhar at top Delhi restaurant, video goes viral Oneindia News

entry.content: In a shocking incident caught on camera, A group of men ordered the popular south Indian dish sambar-dosa at a well-known restaurant in central Delhi’s Connaught Place, but instead they got the shock of their lives, a dead lizard in their bowl. In a video, which is being widely circulated on social media, two men are seen holding out the carcass of the lizard on a spoon; half-eaten food is visible in the background. The men are seen yelling at who appear to be the restaurant staff.
entry.summary: In a shocking incident caught on camera, A group of men ordered the popular south Indian dish sambar-dosa at a well-known restaurant in central Delhi’s Connaught Place, but instead they got the shock of their lives, a dead lizard in their bowl. In a video, which is being widely circulated on social media, two men are seen holding out the carcass of the lizard on a spoon; half-eaten food is visible in the background. The men are seen yelling at who appear to be the restaurant staff.

entry.title: Putra Siregar Jawab Kecurigaan soal Harga Murah di PS Store

link.title: Putra Siregar Jawab Kecurigaan soal Harga Murah di PS Store

entry.content:
Putra Siregar, pemilik toko PS Store buka suara terkait kasus yang tengah heboh saat ini. Berdasarkan laporan dari Kantor Bea dan Cukai Jakarta, toko Putra diduga menjual handphone illegal.
Link terkait:
Putra Siregar menjelaskan, itu adalah kasus lama yang terjadi pada 3 tahun lalu. Namun kemudian baru heboh belakangan ini dan membuat dirinya menjadi sosok yang dianggap penipu.
“Ini kejadian 2017 tapi seolah-olah di framing ini adalah kejadian 2020,” kata Putra Siregar di channel YouTube Deddy Corbuzier, Kamis (30/7/2020).
Selengkapnya dalam video ini.
#PutraSiregar #PSstore
Video Editor: Sulistyo Jati K
==================================
Homepage:
Facebook Fan Page:
Instagram:
Twitter:
entry.summary: Putra Siregar, pemilik toko PS Store buka suara terkait kasus yang tengah heboh saat ini. Berdasarkan laporan dari Kantor Bea dan Cukai Jakarta, toko Putra diduga menjual handphone illegal. Link terkait: Putra Siregar menjelaskan, itu adalah kasus lama yang terjadi pada 3 tahun lalu. Namun kemudian baru heboh belakangan ini dan membuat dirinya menjadi sosok yang dianggap penipu. “Ini kejadian 2017 tapi seolah-olah di framing ini adalah kejadian 2020,” kata Putra Siregar di channel YouTube Deddy Corbuzier, Kamis (30/7/2020). Selengkapnya dalam video ini. #PutraSiregar #PSstore Video Editor: Sulistyo Jati K ================================== Homepage: Facebook Fan Page: Instagram: Twitter:

entry.title: Juan Bernat veut quitter le PSG pour le Barça, le rachat de Newcastle est totalement relancé

link.title: Juan Bernat veut quitter le PSG pour le Barça, le rachat de Newcastle est totalement relancé

entry.content: Le latéral gauche voudrait partir de Paris pour aller à Barcelone, les Magpies pourraient être finalement rachetés avant le début de saison, et l’été sera chaud pour trois stars en Italie, voici votre revue de presse du 31 juillet 2020.
entry.summary: Le latéral gauche voudrait partir de Paris pour aller à Barcelone, les Magpies pourraient être finalement rachetés avant le début de saison, et l’été sera chaud pour trois stars en Italie, voici votre revue de presse du 31 juillet 2020.

entry.title: Girl Cuts Plastic Milk Jug Into Face Mask to Easily Drink Beverage

link.title: Girl Cuts Plastic Milk Jug Into Face Mask to Easily Drink Beverage

entry.content:
This girl got a unique idea to cut a plastic milk jug into a face mask during the lockdown. She emptied the jug and cut it almost into the shape of her face. Then she wore it and demonstrated drinking a beverage using a straw through the jug’s opening mouth.
The underlying music rights are not available for license. For use of the video with the track(s) contained therein, please contact the music publisher(s) or relevant rightsholder(s).
entry.summary: This girl got a unique idea to cut a plastic milk jug into a face mask during the lockdown. She emptied the jug and cut it almost into the shape of her face. Then she wore it and demonstrated drinking a beverage using a straw through the jug’s opening mouth. The underlying music rights are not available for license. For use of the video with the track(s) contained therein, please contact the music publisher(s) or relevant rightsholder(s).

entry.title: Mithila Paintings or Madhubani paintings of Bihar

link.title: Mithila Paintings or Madhubani paintings of Bihar

entry.content: Mithila or Madhubani Paintings get their name from the Mithila region of the state of Bihar in India where this form of art is widely practiced, particularly by women. The origin of Mithila Paintings can be traced back to the period of the Ramayana when King Janak commissioned artists to make these paintings at the time of the marriage of his daughter Sita with Lord Ram. Initially, women of the village drew the paintings on the walls of their homes as an illustration of their thoughts, hopes and dreams. With time, the paintings started becoming a part of festivals and special events like weddings. Themes of the Mithila paintings of Bihar revolve around Hindu deities like Krishna, Ram, Lakshmi, Shiva, Durga and Saraswati. The nature-based themes that are used include the sun, the moon, and sacred plants like tulsi or holy basil. The brush used for Mithila Paintings is made of cotton wrapped around a bamboo stick. The artists prepare the colors that are used for the paintings. The all natural red color is made from the juice of the Kusum flower or red sandalwood, the black color is made by adding soot to cow dung, yellow from combining turmeric with the sap of banyan leaves, blue from indigo, green from various leaves and white from rice flour. A double line is drawn as an outline and the gap between the two lines is filled with either crosses or lines. In 1968, when Bihar was reeling from a severe drought a few women began to paint on paper for sale, to supplement their meagre family income. At first they simply transferred onto paper the traditional images like gods, goddesses and symbolic icons from the wall paintings and soon many other women followed suit. The women passed on this traditional art to their daughters and this art is still alive and thriving. Over time Mithila paintings have demonstrated extraordinary vitality and is definitely a vibrant and powerful tradition. This footage is part of the broadcast stock footage archive of Wilderness Films India Ltd., the largest collection of HD imagery from South Asia. The collection comprises of 150, 000+ hours of high quality broadcast imagery, mostly shot on 4K, 200 fps slow motion, Full HD, HDCAM 1080i High Definition, Alexa and XDCAM. Write to us for licensing this footage on a broadcast format, for use in your production! We are happy to be commissioned to film for you or else provide you with broadcast crewing and production solutions across South Asia. We pride ourselves in bringing the best of India and South Asia to the world… Please subscribe to our channel wildfilmsindia on Youtube www.youtube.com/wildfilmsindia for a steady stream of videos from across India. Also, visit and enjoy your journey across India at www.clipahoy.com , India’s first video-based social networking experience. Reach us at rupindang [at] gmail [dot] com and admin@wildfilmsindia.com To SUBSCRIBE click the below link: www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=WildFilmsIndia Like & Follow Us on: Facebook: ww
entry.summary: Mithila or Madhubani Paintings get their name from the Mithila region of the state of Bihar in India where this form of art is widely practiced, particularly by women. The origin of Mithila Paintings can be traced back to the period of the Ramayana when King Janak commissioned artists to make these paintings at the time of the marriage of his daughter Sita with Lord Ram. Initially, women of the village drew the paintings on the walls of their homes as an illustration of their thoughts, hopes and dreams. With time, the paintings started becoming a part of festivals and special events like weddings. Themes of the Mithila paintings of Bihar revolve around Hindu deities like Krishna, Ram, Lakshmi, Shiva, Durga and Saraswati. The nature-based themes that are used include the sun, the moon, and sacred plants like tulsi or holy basil. The brush used for Mithila Paintings is made of cotton wrapped around a bamboo stick. The artists prepare the colors that are used for the paintings. The all natural red color is made from the juice of the Kusum flower or red sandalwood, the black color is made by adding soot to cow dung, yellow from combining turmeric with the sap of banyan leaves, blue from indigo, green from various leaves and white from rice flour. A double line is drawn as an outline and the gap between the two lines is filled with either crosses or lines. In 1968, when Bihar was reeling from a severe drought a few women began to paint on paper for sale, to supplement their meagre family income. At first they simply transferred onto paper the traditional images like gods, goddesses and symbolic icons from the wall paintings and soon many other women followed suit. The women passed on this traditional art to their daughters and this art is still alive and thriving. Over time Mithila paintings have demonstrated extraordinary vitality and is definitely a vibrant and powerful tradition. This footage is part of the broadcast stock footage archive of Wilderness Films India Ltd., the largest collection of HD imagery from South Asia. The collection comprises of 150, 000+ hours of high quality broadcast imagery, mostly shot on 4K, 200 fps slow motion, Full HD, HDCAM 1080i High Definition, Alexa and XDCAM. Write to us for licensing this footage on a broadcast format, for use in your production! We are happy to be commissioned to film for you or else provide you with broadcast crewing and production solutions across South Asia. We pride ourselves in bringing the best of India and South Asia to the world… Please subscribe to our channel wildfilmsindia on Youtube www.youtube.com/wildfilmsindia for a steady stream of videos from across India. Also, visit and enjoy your journey across India at www.clipahoy.com , India’s first video-based social networking experience. link.title: Kim Kardashian West ‘devastated’ after Kanye’s comments

Kim Kardashian West is "devastated" by Kanye West’s claims and recent Twitter outbursts.
Kim Kardashian West ‘devastated’ after Kanye’s comments

entry.title: Independence day 2020: Kashmir, Bhopal और Travancore का India में ऐसे हुआ था विलय वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Independence day 2020: Kashmir, Bhopal और Travancore का India में ऐसे हुआ था विलय वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Kashmir has been a bone of contention between India and Pakistan since our independence on 15 August 1947. As a stark reality, some vital issues largely generated bad blood between these two neighbouring states – but the Kashmir issue lies on top. Kashmir is situated strategically in an area where Russia, undivided India, China and Afghanistan met in a common frontier. Because of its geographical position, Kashmir is connected with the security of both India and Pakistan.
जम्मू-कश्मीर रियासत के राजा थे हरी सिंह, जो हिन्दू थे लेकिन कश्मीर मुस्लिम बहुल राज्य था. बंटवारे के समय कश्मीर के राजा ने स्वतंत्र रहने का निश्चय किया था. महाराजा का ये फैसला उस समय गलत सिद्ध हो गया जब जिन्ना के कहने पर 20 अक्टूबर 1947 को कबाइली लुटेरों के वेष में पाकिस्तानी सेना को कश्मीर में भेज दिया और उन्होंने दुकानों के लूटपाट शुरू कर दी घरों में चोरी और आगजनी करने के साथ ही महिलाओं को भी अगवा कर लिया और इसी तरह की तबाही मचाते हुए पूर्वी कश्मीर की तरफ बढ़ रहे थे तो महाराजा हरी सिंह ने जवाहरलाल नेहरु से सैन्य मदद मांगी. जिसके बाद भारत ने राजा हरी सिंह के सामने कश्मीर को कुछ स्वायत्ता के साथ विलय का प्रस्ताव रखा.
#IndependenceDay2020 #15August2020 #SwatantrataDiwas2020
entry.summary: Kashmir has been a bone of contention between India and Pakistan since our independence on 15 August 1947. As a stark reality, some vital issues largely generated bad blood between these two neighbouring states – but the Kashmir issue lies on top. Kashmir is situated strategically in an area where Russia, undivided India, China and Afghanistan met in a common frontier. Because of its geographical position, Kashmir is connected with the security of both India and Pakistan. जम्मू-कश्मीर रियासत के राजा थे हरी सिंह, जो हिन्दू थे लेकिन कश्मीर मुस्लिम बहुल राज्य था. बंटवारे के समय कश्मीर के राजा ने स्वतंत्र रहने का निश्चय किया था. महाराजा का ये फैसला उस समय गलत सिद्ध हो गया जब जिन्ना के कहने पर 20 अक्टूबर 1947 को कबाइली लुटेरों के वेष में पाकिस्तानी सेना को कश्मीर में भेज दिया और उन्होंने दुकानों के लूटपाट शुरू कर दी घरों में चोरी और आगजनी करने के साथ ही महिलाओं को भी अगवा कर लिया और इसी तरह की तबाही मचाते हुए पूर्वी कश्मीर की तरफ बढ़ रहे थे तो महाराजा हरी सिंह ने जवाहरलाल नेहरु से सैन्य मदद मांगी. जिसके बाद भारत ने राजा हरी सिंह के सामने कश्मीर को कुछ स्वायत्ता के साथ विलय का प्रस्ताव रखा. #IndependenceDay2020 #15August2020 #SwatantrataDiwas2020

entry.title: Jayalalitha-வின் Veda Illam Library ரகசியம் Oneindia Tamil

link.title: Jayalalitha-வின் Veda Illam Library ரகசியம் Oneindia Tamil

entry.content:
ஜெயலலிதா அவர்களின் வேதா நிலையத்திற்குள் நுழைய வெகுசிலருக்கே அனுமதி இருந்தது. ஜெயலலிதா அவர்கள் தனது இல்லத்திற்குள் தனக்கென ஒரு நூலகத்தையே வைத்திருந்தார். தனது புத்தகங்கள் அனைத்தையும் அவற்றின் வரிசை எண் கொண்டே அடையாளம் காணும் அளவிற்கு புத்தகங்களை விரும்புபவராக இருந்தார். அவரது இல்லத்தில் இருந்த முதல் மாடியிலிருந்த நூலகத்தில் பல மணி நேரங்களை அவர் செலவழித்தார். அவருக்கு புத்தகம் மீதிருந்த தீராக்காதலை பற்றி இந்த பதிவில் பார்க்கலாம்.
Officials and insiders who had direct access to Jayalalithaa and her residence recalled how she zealously maintained her books with serial numbers and title stickers. And of the long hours she spent reading on the first floor of Veda Nilayam.
#VedaNilayam
#Jayalalitha
entry.summary: ஜெயலலிதா அவர்களின் வேதா நிலையத்திற்குள் நுழைய வெகுசிலருக்கே அனுமதி இருந்தது. ஜெயலலிதா அவர்கள் தனது இல்லத்திற்குள் தனக்கென ஒரு நூலகத்தையே வைத்திருந்தார். தனது புத்தகங்கள் அனைத்தையும் அவற்றின் வரிசை எண் கொண்டே அடையாளம் காணும் அளவிற்கு புத்தகங்களை விரும்புபவராக இருந்தார். அவரது இல்லத்தில் இருந்த முதல் மாடியிலிருந்த நூலகத்தில் பல மணி நேரங்களை அவர் செலவழித்தார். அவருக்கு புத்தகம் மீதிருந்த தீராக்காதலை பற்றி இந்த பதிவில் பார்க்கலாம். Officials and insiders who had direct access to Jayalalithaa and her residence recalled how she zealously maintained her books with serial numbers and title stickers. And of the long hours she spent reading on the first floor of Veda Nilayam. #VedaNilayam #Jayalalitha

entry.title: IPL 2020: N Srinivasan says MS Dhoni refused to include one big player in CSK वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: IPL 2020: N Srinivasan says MS Dhoni refused to include one big player in CSK वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
N Srinivasan, the former BCCI president and head of India Cements, which owns the CSK franchise, agreed that Dhoni is a man of instinct who doesn’t believe in attending team meetings and going over data, The Super Kings have won the lucrative tournament three times one less than Mumbai Indians and reached the knockouts in each of the 10 seasons they have been a part of.
आइपीएल 2020 की शुरुआत 19 सितंबर से होने जा रहा है और फाइनल 10 नवंबर को खेला जाएगा, तमाम टीमों ने इसके लिए तैयारियां भी शुरू कर दी है, आईपीएल के इतिहास में मुंबई इंडियंस के बाद सबसे सफल टीमों में से एक चैन्नई सुपर किंग्स इस साल धोनी की कप्तानी खिताब जीतने के लिए जी जान लगा देगी, भारतीय क्रिकेट कंट्रोल बोर्ड के पूर्व अध्यक्ष एन श्रीनिवासन ने बताया, श्रीनिवासन ने एक पुराना किस्सा सुनाया हुए कहा कि वह टीम का मौहाल खराब ना हो इस वजह से कई बार अच्छे खिलाड़ियों को भी बाहर रखने से नहीं कतराते।
#IPL2020 #NSrinivasan #MSDhoni
entry.summary: N Srinivasan, the former BCCI president and head of India Cements, which owns the CSK franchise, agreed that Dhoni is a man of instinct who doesn’t believe in attending team meetings and going over data, The Super Kings have won the lucrative tournament three times one less than Mumbai Indians and reached the knockouts in each of the 10 seasons they have been a part of. आइपीएल 2020 की शुरुआत 19 सितंबर से होने जा रहा है और फाइनल 10 नवंबर को खेला जाएगा, तमाम टीमों ने इसके लिए तैयारियां भी शुरू कर दी है, आईपीएल के इतिहास में मुंबई इंडियंस के बाद सबसे सफल टीमों में से एक चैन्नई सुपर किंग्स इस साल धोनी की कप्तानी खिताब जीतने के लिए जी जान लगा देगी, भारतीय क्रिकेट कंट्रोल बोर्ड के पूर्व अध्यक्ष एन श्रीनिवासन ने बताया, श्रीनिवासन ने एक पुराना किस्सा सुनाया हुए कहा कि वह टीम का मौहाल खराब ना हो इस वजह से कई बार अच्छे खिलाड़ियों को भी बाहर रखने से नहीं कतराते। #IPL2020 #NSrinivasan #MSDhoni

entry.title: Pelaku Pencemaran Nama Baik Ahok: Saya Juga Mengalami Seperti Bu Vero

link.title: Pelaku Pencemaran Nama Baik Ahok: Saya Juga Mengalami Seperti Bu Vero

entry.content:
JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Polisi mengungkap kasus penyebaran nama baik yang menimpa Komisaris Utama PT Pertamina, Basuki Tjahaja Purnama alias Ahok.
Melalui Konferensi Pers di Polda Metro Jaya, Kamis (30/07/2020), Kabid Humas Polda Metro Jaya Kombes Yusri Yunus menyampaikan jika pelaku merupakan seorang wanita berinisial KS (63) yang tinggal di Denpasar, Bali.
Pelaku sekaligus pemilik akun Instagram @ito.kurnia berhasil ditangkap polisi di Bali.
Selain itu, adapun pemilik akun Instagram @an7a_s679 yang berinisial EJ berada di Sumatera Utara yang berhasil diamankan oleh Polda setempat dengan barang bukti handphone, serta email berkait.
Yusri mengatakan jika kedua pelaku ini merupakan satu komunitas.
Motif dari pelaku ini adalah penggemar yang memiliki histori yang sama dengan Veronica Tan.
"Mereka semua ini penggemar saudari Veronica dan merasa punya kesamaan histori," lanjut Yusri.
Sementara itu, KS mengaku dirinya mengunggah lantaran emosi dan merasakan hal yang dialami Veronica.
"Yang didasarkan oleh emosi, karena saya merasa bahwa adalah sesama wanita yang mungkin juga pernah mengalami hal-hal yang juga dialami Bu Vero," ujar KS.
KS juga menegaskan bahwa yang ia lakukan murni karena nurani dan tak ada tunggangan politik apapun.
entry.summary: JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Polisi mengungkap kasus penyebaran nama baik yang menimpa Komisaris Utama PT Pertamina, Basuki Tjahaja Purnama alias Ahok. Melalui Konferensi Pers di Polda Metro Jaya, Kamis (30/07/2020), Kabid Humas Polda Metro Jaya Kombes Yusri Yunus menyampaikan jika pelaku merupakan seorang wanita berinisial KS (63) yang tinggal di Denpasar, Bali. Pelaku sekaligus pemilik akun Instagram @ito.kurnia berhasil ditangkap polisi di Bali. Selain itu, adapun pemilik akun Instagram @an7a_s679 yang berinisial EJ berada di Sumatera Utara yang berhasil diamankan oleh Polda setempat dengan barang bukti handphone, serta email berkait. Yusri mengatakan jika kedua pelaku ini merupakan satu komunitas. Motif dari pelaku ini adalah penggemar yang memiliki histori yang sama dengan Veronica Tan. "Mereka semua ini penggemar saudari Veronica dan merasa punya kesamaan histori," lanjut Yusri. Sementara itu, KS mengaku dirinya mengunggah lantaran emosi dan merasakan hal yang dialami Veronica. "Yang didasarkan oleh emosi, karena saya merasa bahwa adalah sesama wanita yang mungkin juga pernah mengalami hal-hal yang juga dialami Bu Vero," ujar KS. KS juga menegaskan bahwa yang ia lakukan murni karena nurani dan tak ada tunggangan politik apapun.

entry.title: Belgique: un homme refuse de mettre un masque, un policier le gaze et le gifle !

link.title: Belgique: un homme refuse de mettre un masque, un policier le gaze et le gifle !
